/Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/usr/bin/c++ -g -std=c++17 -Wall -g -arch arm64 -isysroot /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk -dynamiclib -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -Wl,-undefined -Wl,dynamic_lookup -fPIC -undefined dynamic_lookup -o libXSim.dylib -install_name @rpath/libXSim.dylib CMakeFiles/XSim.dir/sst/src/xsim_core/core.cpp.o CMakeFiles/XSim.dir/sst/src/xsim_core/memory_wrapper.cpp.o
